title: Double Time Challenge
description: 10-minute EMOM chained with an 8-minute AMRAP for a complete endurance challenge

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Brisk march in place
exercises.instructions: Walk quickly in place with arm swings

exercises.name: Inchworms
exercises.instructions: Standing, walk hands forward into a plank, then walk back

exercises.name: Jumping jacks
exercises.instructions: Jump spreading arms and legs, return feet together

exercises.name: Commando push-ups
exercises.instructions: Alternate between forearm plank and high plank

exercises.name: Squats
exercises.instructions: Feet shoulder-width apart, lower thighs parallel to the floor

exercises.name: Forward lunges
exercises.instructions: Big step forward, back knee grazes the floor

exercises.name: Toe touches
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs vertical, reach hands to feet

exercises.name: Wide push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands wider than the shoulders, chest focus

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Chest stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm against a wall at 90 degrees, pivot the body

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
